docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMEC, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KORDAHL, CAROLINE $2,598.85 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,798.85, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE COST FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KORDAHL, CAROLINE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMEC, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT KORDAHL, CAROLINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RACHEL SAMEC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLINE KORDAHL IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF STATED THE PROOF OF SERVICE HAS BEEN SERVED BY A PROCESS SERVER BUT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE REQUIRED TO BE FILED WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF ALSO STATED SHE MAY BE WILL FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU, NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $235.98) SERVED SEP-02-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KORDAHL, CAROLINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2022 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF RACHEL SAMEC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLINE KORDAHL IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON NOV-14-2022)
